raw_consumer_statement: I immediately called the number ( XXXX ) shown next to the unauthorized charges and vented my objections. After our discussion, the representative agreed to cancel the charges and provided cancellation # XXXX. I sent the information to the Citi after calling them and requesting that my card be canceled. Citi representative during the call instructed me to pay the minimum amount required ( ( {$41.00} ) to prevent being charged a late fee. Attached is my correspondence with Citi and their responses.
